title: Spring
author: William Blake
content:
Sound the flute!
     Now it's mute!
     Bird's delight,
     Day and night,
     Nightingale,
     In the dale,
     Lark in sky,--
     Merrily,
Merrily merrily, to welcome in the year.

     Little boy,
     Full of joy;
     Little girl,
     Sweet and small;
     Cock does crow,
     So do you;
     Merry voice,
     Infant noise;
Merrily, merrily, to welcome in the year.

     Little lamb,
     Here I am;
     Come and lick
     My white neck;
     Let me pull
     Your soft wool;
     Let me kiss
     Your soft face;
Merrily, merrily, to welcome in the year.
